mapper.select: select * from sys_message where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
select count(1) from sys_message where user_id = #{userId}
select * from sys_message where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.update: update sys_message set read_status = 1, read_time = #{readTime} where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
update sys_message set read_status = 1, read_time = #{readTime} where user_id = #{userId} and read_status = 0
